extracted_clauses: Payment Schedule: Client shall pay Contractor within 30 days of invoice date.

Late Payment: Any payment not received within the specified period will be 
subject to a late fee of 5% per month on the outstanding balance.
Service Fees: A service fee of $500 will be charged for each deliverable.

Penalties: Failure to meet payment obligations will result in penalties 
equal to 10% of the total contract value.

Invoicing: Invoices will be issued monthly and must be paid in full before 
the next billing cycle.

Financial Liability: The Contractor shall not be held financially liable 
for delays caused by the Client.
Payment Method: All payments must be made via wire transfer or certified check.

Overdue Amounts: Amounts overdue by more than 60 days will incur an additional 
penalty of 15% and may result in suspension of services.
